Description

The parcel approver.

The entity class for the audit.

The stateless session bean for the auditor.

The box entity class.
BoxBean
The stateless session bean for box.
Uses container-managed transactions.

The capsule.
CapsuleAdministrator
The capsule administrator.
CapsuleAdministratorBean
The Capsule administrator stateful session bean.
The bean-managed transaction management is used.
CardinalDirection
The cardinal direction enumeration.
CentralBox
The central box entity class.
If the relationship is bidirectional, the non-owning side must use the mappedBy element.
ChecksManagedBean
The CDI managed bean for the EJBs checks.
ClientApplication
The application for JBoss Application Client.
Common
The common interface for other remote view and local view interfaces.
CommonImpl
The abstract implementation of the Common interface.

The message-driven bean for the parcel creation confirmation.

Level

The CDI managed bean for the Level.
